title: Ambient Fog
description: Ambient fog, sky and much more.
body:
𝙒𝙞𝙩𝙝𝙤𝙪𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝙢𝙤𝙙 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙤𝙪𝙧𝙘𝙚𝙥𝙖𝙘𝙠 𝙬𝙞𝙡𝙡 𝙣𝙤𝙩 𝙬𝙤𝙧𝙠!
![polytone mod required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c73a0cf0d01582171926f070594b33683924160.png)
The resource pack adds a rich atmosphere to the Minecraft world. Terrain and skies vary depending on the biome, fog distances in each biome, and much more. It's recommended to play with 10-12 render chunks.Disable 𝙁𝙊𝙂 𝙊𝘾𝘾𝙇𝙐𝙎𝙄𝙊𝙉
in Sodium settings. 
![Fog occlusion disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7a7c9e48e7eb44714ae84ea52a2a39ea80143cb.jpeg)
Enjoy playing with atmospheric fog!

THERE IS COMPATIBILITY WITH THE ENDERSCAPE MOD
![Enderscape ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5eb83a2344e8ee488304370d0335e528693b90a.jpeg)
